raw:
{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 2,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The critique correctly identifies the framing mismatch between the claimed Lyapunov guarantees and the described method. It also suggests potential solutions to address this issue.",
    "R1.2": "The critique points out inconsistencies in the description of the system, but doesn't delve into a comprehensive analysis of the logical flow or propose detailed repairs.",
    "RX.1": "The critique acknowledges uncertainty regarding the Lyapunov claim and highlights the lack of evidence supporting it.",
    "RX.3": "The critique identifies some scope issues with the evaluation, particularly the limited dataset size and lack of robustness analysis.",
    "RX.4": "The critique doesn't identify any harmful content or regressions in the output.",
    "RX.5": "The critique mentions the absence of citations and traceability for claims made in the text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The critique correctly identifies the framing mismatch between the claimed Lyapunov guarantees and the described method. It also suggests potential solutions to address this issue.
rationale.R1.2: The critique points out inconsistencies in the description of the system, but doesn't delve into a comprehensive analysis of the logical flow or propose detailed repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The critique acknowledges uncertainty regarding the Lyapunov claim and highlights the lack of evidence supporting it.
rationale.RX.3: The critique identifies some scope issues with the evaluation, particularly the limited dataset size and lack of robustness analysis.
rationale.RX.4: The critique doesn't identify any harmful content or regressions in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The critique mentions the absence of citations and traceability for claims made in the text.
